description_long: This object is a single, elongated cucumber with a dark green, bumpy, and textured exterior. The surface is covered in irregular, wart-like protrusions, giving it a rough and rugged appearance. The cucumber tapers slightly at one end, while the other end is broader and rounded. Its color is a deep, muted green, consistent throughout the body, with no visible color variation or markings. The skin appears matte and non-reflective, with a natural, organic finish. There are no visible cuts, stickers, or blemishes, and the object is isolated against a plain background.
description: A dark green, bumpy cucumber with a rough, textured surface and a tapered end. The skin is matte and unmarked.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length and bumpy, textured surface of the cucumber.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the rounded, broader end and the dense surface texture.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the elongated shape and consistent rough texture.
description_view_3: Tapered end view emphasizing the narrowing tip and surface bumps.
attribute_location: isolated in space with an undefined background
